How o9 Works The Network

Chapter 2 · Topic 10

Packing

Coated seeds (Item I) are packed into saleable units to produce Item J.

Packing is the final BOM process in the warehouse: Item I is loaded into labelled, saleable units to produce Item J — the finished packaged product. The Packer machine runs at 0.25 hours per unit. Item J is the first item in this network that is ready to ship to a customer.
